title: Detail Brush - Modded Disc Compat
description: Adds compatibility between detail brush and various mods
body:
![image of discs included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b60e59caf8aaf30870281525602c79f23649bb.png)

Supports:
- Alex's Mobs
- Berry Good
- Bygone Nether
- Create Connected
- Ecologics
- Endergetic
- Environmental
- Neapolitan
- Jaidens Nether Expansion
- Oreganized
- Quark
- Sully's Mod
- Trial Chambers Backport
- Upgrade Aquatic
- Vanilla Backport
- Snow Pig
- It Takes a Pillage Continuation
- Gipples Galore
- End's Phantasm
- VinURL
- Eternal nether
